hero.text: Believe in the magic of new beginnings.
hero.author: Anonymous

aries.general: Today encourages you to take bold steps. Embrace new opportunities that come your way.
aries.love: Your passion ignites today; it's a perfect time to express your feelings.
aries.career: A project may require your leadership; step up and inspire others.

taurus.general: Stability is key today. Focus on creating a solid foundation for your dreams.
taurus.love: Expressing your feelings will deepen your bonds; it’s time to be open.
taurus.career: Your steadfast nature will be recognized; don’t hesitate to promote your contributions.

gemini.general: Communication plays a vital role today. Share your ideas; they're more valuable than you think.
gemini.love: A conversation can shift the dynamic in your relationship positively.
gemini.career: Network and connect; new opportunities will arise through collaboration.

cancer.general: Today is about nurturing your relationships and creating harmony in your surroundings.
cancer.love: An emotional conversation may bring you closer to your partner.
cancer.career: Trust your intuition as you navigate workplace dynamics; it will guide you.

leo.general: You will shine in social settings today; your confidence will attract others.
leo.love: Romance thrives in passionate encounters; let your heart lead.
leo.career: Your creativity will provide innovative solutions; don’t hold back.

virgo.general: Focus on the details today. Organization will help you achieve your goals.
virgo.love: A practical approach in love helps to resolve misunderstandings.
virgo.career: Your analytical skills will be appreciated; take the lead on challenging tasks.

libra.general: Balance is key today. Seek harmony in your surroundings and relationships.
libra.love: Your diplomatic skills will help smooth out conflicts in your love life.
libra.career: Collaborative projects will yield success; work with your team for optimal results.

scorpio.general: Embrace your passion and intensity today, but remember to consider others' perspectives.
scorpio.love: Deep emotional connections may arise; allow vulnerability to flourish.
scorpio.career: Your determination will shine through; focus on long-term goals.

sagittarius.general: Adventure awaits! Don’t shy from stepping outside your comfort zone today.
sagittarius.love: A spontaneous date can reignite the spark in your relationship.
sagittarius.career: Your optimism is contagious; inspire others with your vision.

capricorn.general: It's a day to strategize. Take time to plan your next moves carefully.
capricorn.love: Commitment can deepen in your relationships; be open about your feelings.
capricorn.career: Your work ethic will set you apart; recognition could be on the horizon.

aquarius.general: Innovation is favored today. Share your unconventional ideas; they could lead to breakthroughs.
aquarius.love: Your uniqueness attracts attention; embrace your individuality in relationships.
aquarius.career: Take calculated risks in your career; be the change you wish to see.

pisces.general: Intuition guides you today. Trust your gut feelings to lead you in the right direction.
pisces.love: A dreamy connection may deepen through shared experiences.
pisces.career: Creative solutions will emerge if you connect with your inner voice.

professional.text: Success doesn't come from what you do occasionally, it comes from what you do consistently.
professional.author: Marie Forleo

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen, you create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Do not wait to strike till the iron is hot, but make it hot by striking.
professional.author: William Butler Yeats

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

motivation.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
motivation.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
motivation.author: William James

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

motivation.text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: It is the courage to continue that counts.
motivation.author: Winston Churchill

motivation.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
motivation.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

captions.text: Every day is a fresh start.
captions.author: Anonymous

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: It has become appallingly obvious that our technology has exceeded our humanity.
tech.author: Albert Einstein

tech.text: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
tech.author: Arthur C. Clarke

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: The greatest advances of civilization, whether in architecture or music, have never come from the workshop but from the human spirit.
tech.author: Daniel J. Boorstin

tech.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
tech.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

fun.text: Laughter is timeless, imagination has no age, and dreams are forever.
fun.author: Walt Disney

fun.text: Be like a proton: always positive.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: Why fit in when you were born to stand out?
fun.author: Dr. Seuss

fun.text: Life is short. Smile while you still have teeth.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: I'm on a seafood diet. I see food, and I eat it.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: If you think adventure is dangerous, try routine; it’s lethal.
fun.author: Paulo Coelho

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don’t see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Faith sees the invisible, believes the unbelievable, and receives the impossible.
faith.author: Corrie ten Boom

faith.text: You must do the things you think you cannot do.
faith.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

faith.text: Faith is a knowledge within the heart, beyond the reach of proof.
faith.author: Khalil Gibran

faith.text: Faith is the bird that feels the light and sings when the dawn is still dark.
faith.author: Rabindranath Tagore

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Do not dwell in the past, do not dream of the future, concentrate the mind on the present moment.
wisdom.author: Buddha

wisdom.text: The more I read, the more I acquire, the more certain I am that I know nothing.
wisdom.author: Voltaire

wisdom.text: An investment in knowledge pays the best interest.
wisdom.author: Benjamin Franklin

wisdom.text: Wisdom is not a product of schooling but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein
